content:
Exactly right — *press and hold* (or long-tap) on a thread title in the sidebar is the iPad equivalent of the “swipe left” gesture on desktop or phone. That’s what brings up the contextual menu with **Archive**, **Rename**, **Delete**, etc. It’s a small detail, but once you know it, it makes archiving far smoother — you can simply hold, tap *Archive*, and move down the list. If you ever want to review your archived threads again:
1.
